## smilelog appointment create

Create an appointment

```
smilelog appointment create [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -d, --duration int           duration of the appointment (in minutes) (default 30)
  -h, --help                   help for create
  -p, --patient-id int         id of the patient
  -s, --scheduled-for string   The datetime <y-m-d hh:mm> (e.g.: '2026-04-16 10:30') the appointment will be scheduled
```

* [smilelog appointment](smilelog_appointment.md)	 - Manage appointments
